antipattern.description: Reporting only precision; omitting MRR and hit_rate.
antipattern.reason: Cannot distinguish 'correct doc ranked low' from 'correct doc missing'. Detector: only one metric per row. Fix: r2-mrr-and-hit-rate.
Cross-run comparison invalid. Detector: K differs across reports in CI history. Fix: r1-fixed-k.

antipattern.description: Report omits embedding model or index hash.
antipattern.reason: Cannot reproduce or compare. Detector: snapshot block missing. Fix: r5-include-version-snapshot.
